title: Validation Error DTO
description: ErrorEnvelopeDTO specialized for 422 input-validation failures. Composes error_envelope_schema.json and narrows `details` to a {field: [reason, ...]} map so the client can attach per-field messages. Aligned with BE#671.

details.description: Per-field validation messages: each key is a field name, each value a non-empty list of human-readable reasons. No server internals.
